adblock.title: Bloker Reklama
adblock.description: Besprijekorno blokira video i feed oglase, ne podliježe YouTubeovim metodama za sprječavanje blokatora

sponsorblock_full_unused.title: Sponzorski blokator
sponsorblock_full_unused.description: Preskače segmente sponzora u YouTube videozapisima koristeći bazu podataka prikupljenu od strane korisnika. Također podržava preskakanje uvoda, završetaka i podsjetnika za pretplatu

dearrow.title: DeArrow
dearrow.description: Zamjenjuje naslove i sličice tačnijim, manje senzacionalističkim verzijama iz javne baze podataka prikupljenim sa strane korisnika. Usporava učitavanje, jer mora preuzeti informacije sa servera

dislikes.title: Vratite donji palac
dislikes.description: Koristi YouTube API za vraćanje palca prema dolje (returnyoutubedislike.com) za ponovno dodavanje oznake 'nesviđa mi se' na YouTube. Usporava učitavanje videa jer mora preuzeti informacije sa servera

hardware_decoding.title: Hardversko Dekodiranje
hardware_decoding.description: Koristi vašu grafičku karticu za dekodiranje videa kada je to moguće. Onemogućavanje ove opcije može riješiti probleme s reprodukcijom, ali može uzrokovati kašnjenje ovisno o vašem procesoru. Ponovo pokrenite nakon prebacivanja.

low_memory_mode.title: Režim za Nisku Memoriju
low_memory_mode.description: Uputuje YouTube-u da omogući način rada s malo memorije, što može poboljšati pokretanje na sporijim uređajima, ali na štetu nekih izglednih efekata. Ponovo pokrenite nakon prebacivanja.

fullscreen.title: Cijeli Ekran
fullscreen.description: Omogućava cijeli ekran i čini da se DeckTube uvijek pokrene u punom ekranu.

keep_on_top.title: Ostani na vrhu
keep_on_top.description: Omogućava opciju "Ostani na vrhu" i pokreće DeckTube s prozorom zakačenim preko svakog drugog prozora.

userstyles.title: Prilagođeni CSS (korisnički stilovi)
userstyles.description: Omogućava ubrizgavanje prilagođenih CSS stilova. Postavite svoje .css datoteke u mapu 'korisnički stilovi'.

themes.title: Theme
themes.description: Apply a colour theme to the interface. Themes only change colours, so they never affect navigation.

splash.title: Boot Animation
splash.description: Play the YouTube logo animation when DeckTube launches

cleanup.title: Clean Up
cleanup.description: Remove features you don't want. These are DeckTube removals, not YouTube settings.

quality.title: Video Quality
quality.description: Force a preferred or maximum resolution. Useful for saving battery and data on the Deck.

sleep_timer.title: Sleep Timer
sleep_timer.description: Pause playback after a set time, or at the end of the current video.

keep_awake.title: Keep Awake
keep_awake.description: Stop the screen sleeping while a video is playing. Fixes the Steam Deck sleeping mid-video.

remove_ask_gemini.title: Remove Ask (Gemini)
remove_ask_gemini.description: Removes the Gemini-powered Ask button from the video bar.

remove_end_screens.title: Remove End Screens
remove_end_screens.description: Hides the grid of suggested videos that covers the end of a video.

remove_info_cards.title: Remove Info Cards
remove_info_cards.description: Hides the info cards and the 'i' teaser that pop up over videos.

disable_autoplay.title: Disable Autoplay
disable_autoplay.description: Stops the next video playing automatically when one ends.

remove_comments.title: Remove Comments
remove_comments.description: Hides the comments section on the watch page.

dismiss_are_you_there.title: Skip 'Are You Still Watching'
dismiss_are_you_there.description: Automatically dismisses the inactivity prompt so playback never stops to ask.

sponsorblock_selfpromo.title: Skip Self-Promotion
sponsorblock_selfpromo.description: Skip unpaid self or product promotion.

sponsorblock_preview.title: Skip Previews
sponsorblock_preview.description: Skip previews and recaps of the video's own content.

sponsorblock_music_offtopic.title: Skip Non-Music
sponsorblock_music_offtopic.description: In music videos, skip the non-music sections.

restart.title: Restart required
restart.message: This change needs a restart to take effect.

update.ready_message: The update has been downloaded. Restart to install it?
